name: flow-07-feed-scorer-and-delivery
description: T77 FeedScorer (DATA_PIPELINE) → T78 FeedDeliveryOrchestrator (ORCHESTRATION). T77 scores all items including score=0 passthrough. T78 applies delivery threshold and calls T81 independently.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: feed_score_zero_passthrough (T77), two_phase_privacy_independent (T78), store_before_enqueue (both)
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE and ROUTING arch patterns for T77/T78: zero-score passthrough, two-phase privacy gate

T77: compute score from FREEDOM weights, output { feedItemId, score } for EVERY item (score=0 passes through). T78: call T81 unconditionally, apply delivery threshold, storeDocument → FeedDelivered emit.

Generate feed-scorer.service.ts (T77): weights from FREEDOM config, return { item, score } for all items. Generate feed-delivery.service.ts (T78): inject PrivacyGatekeeper, call check() unconditionally, threshold from FREEDOM config, storeDocument BEFORE FeedDelivered.
Named check validation: feed_score_zero_passthrough, two_phase_privacy_independent, config_over_hardcode, store_before_enqueue
Score generated code 0-100 against T77/T78 iron rules: zero-score passthrough, two-phase privacy, FREEDOM config weights, DNA-8 ordering
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple T77: chosen=score=0 passthrough, rejected=filter score<=threshold in T77. DPO triple T78: chosen=unconditional T81 call, rejected=read T76 cached privacy flag. curriculumTier=1.

entry: FeedItemGenerated event → T77; FeedScored event → T78
